prompt.name: F1: API 类型补全
prompt.sub_stage_name: ChatResponse + extractPayloadText + useCoachState 补全 Phase 19-26 字段
prompt.role:
ChatResponse 类型只定义了 action_type/payload/trace_id 等基础字段, 缺少 Phase 19-26 的教学字段: llm_generated, personalization_evidence, difficulty_contract, diagnostic_result, memory_status, awakening.
extractPayloadText() 只提取文本字段, 不展示教学状态。 useCoachState 不存储教学元数据。
prompt.context:
后端实际返回的字段 (agent.act() 输出): action_type, payload, trace_id, intent, domain_passport, safety_allowed, gate_decision, audit_level, llm_generated, llm_model, llm_tokens, personalization_evidence, memory_status, difficulty_contract, diagnostic_result, diagnostic_probe, ttm_stage, sdt_profile, flow_channel, awakening, _self_eval
前端定义的 ChatResponse (api.ts:11-27): action_type, payload, trace_id, intent, domain_passport, safety_allowed, gate_decision, audit_level, ttm_stage, sdt_profile, flow_channel, pulse, diagnostic_result, diagnostic_probe
缺少: llm_generated, llm_model, llm_tokens, personalization_evidence, memory_status, difficulty_contract, awakening
副作用: localStorage 可能缓存了旧格式消息。 兼容: 新增字段全部 optional, 旧缓存缺失时不崩溃。

success_criteria.item: npm run build 无 TS 错误
ChatResponse 包含全部 Phase 19-26 字段
localStorage 旧消息不导致崩溃
